title: The Buttercream Boys
description: The Buttercream Boys is a joyful, uplifting improvised comedy show where Marc Salmon and Nick Adamson spend an hour trying to make a real audience member’s dream come true. Every performance is unique—chaotic, heartfelt, and created with the whole room. Marc is a West End Old Act of the Year finalist (“naturally funny” – Mark Simmons; “a very funny dude” – Mike OT). Nick is a long-time performer with The Free Association, known for his warmth, quick wit, and razor-sharp improv instincts. Fresh from Lambeth Fringe and now running a popular monthly residency in Elephant and Castle, the show consistently sends audiences home smiling, energised, and a little bit in love with the world again.
